title: Salary Calculator

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: Finance team built a salary calculator. Before it goes anywhere near actual payroll we need proper test cases. Sneha can you explain the rules?

meeting_script.name: Sneha Kapoor
meeting_script.message: Sure. Take-home salary has three components. Basic salary is the base. We add HRA which is 40 percent of basic salary.

meeting_script.name: Sneha Kapoor
meeting_script.message: We also add DA — Dearness Allowance — which is 20 percent of basic. And then we deduct professional tax of Rs 200 from the final total.

meeting_script.name: Rahul Mehta
meeting_script.message: Just to be clear — professional tax is fixed at Rs 200 for everyone regardless of how much they earn.

meeting_script.name: Priya Sharma
meeting_script.message: The function is already built. Your job is to write test cases that catch any bugs. Head to your desk.

buggy_ai_code:
def calculate_salary(basic):
    hra = basic * 0.4
    da = basic * 0.2
    return basic + hra + da
